summary: Web-based lottery game application on Internet Computer with React frontend and Motoko backend where users can purchase tickets, participate in drawings, and see results
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Colorful lottery ticket illustration with number grid and lottery branding (lottery-ticket.dim_400x250.png)
- Golden trophy or prize icon for winners display (winner-trophy.dim_128x128.png)
- Background pattern with subtle lottery ball motifs for main interface (lottery-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create ticket purchase functionality allowing users to buy lottery tickets with unique identifiers
Build lottery drawing mechanism to randomly select winners from purchased tickets
Create results viewing interface displaying lottery outcomes, winning tickets, and drawing history
Design a vibrant, playful visual theme with lottery-inspired aesthetics including ticket motifs, number displays, and engaging color palette that creates an exciting gaming atmosphere
Integrate generated lottery-themed images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Users can participate in lottery drawings
Implement backend lottery state management with ticket tracking, drawing rounds, and winner selection logic in the main actor
